entities.description: A staple food crop subject to genetic improvement research

entities.name: GENETIC IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of improving the genetic makeup of a crop to enhance its characteristics

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY IMPACT
entities.description: The measurable effect of varietal improvement on the yield and productivity of crops

entities.name: VARIETAL IMPROVEMENT RESEARCH
entities.description: Research focused on developing and improving crop varieties

entities.name: CONSULTATIVE GROUP ON INTERNATIONAL AGRICULTURAL RESEARCH
entities.description: A global partnership of international agricultural research centers

entities.name: GREEN REVOLUTION
entities.description: A period of significant increase in agricultural productivity through the adoption of new technologies and breeding

entities.name: BREEDING
entities.description: The process of producing offspring with desired genetic traits

entities.name: CROP VARIETIES
entities.description: Different versions or cultivars of a crop species

entities.name: STAPLE FOOD CROPS
entities.description: Crops that are eaten routinely and constitute a dominant portion of a standard diet

entities.name: ECONOMETRIC MODELS
entities.description: Statistical models used to evaluate investment and analyze the impact of agricultural research

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL RESEARCH
entities.description: Scientific study aimed at improving agricultural productivity and sustainability
